name: Cloudgate Podcast
description: Angular podcast app with featured carousel, playlists, and workflow-backed catalog — ready for Cloudgate dev preview.

workflowImport.description: Import this file in Cloudgate (Imports) to create the GET /podcasts API the app calls at runtime.
workflowImport.publishHint: Publish the Podcast Catalog endpoint to sandbox, then test GET /sbx/api/podcasts on your apps gateway.
